violations.text: The menus are lacking an allergen statement. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, hotel pans with sticker residue) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026
Marinara sauce was observed with date mark exceeding 7 days. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2026
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026

The concentration of the sanitizer solution for the wet wiping cloths was less than 100 parts per million (ppm). The required concentration for quaternary ammonium sanitizer is 200-400 ppm. PIC refilled sani bucket. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2026
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -under prep unit hood -under grill -can opener and base -bottom shelf reach-in freezer. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026

The ceiling in front of the expo station and in the staff/handicap restroom were observed in poor repair. Inspector observed dripping water and peeled paint at expo line, a hole in the ceiling and water dripping in the restroom. Per PIC, the hotel HVAC system had a leak, affecting these areas. Hotel is aware and service has been scheduled. Food and equipment in expo area is protected; restroom has been taken out fo service. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (potato slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Item taken to be cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2025

The following were observed in poor repair: -walk-in gaskets (ordered) -walk-in latch (ordered) -small prep unit (leak/condensation build-up) -small prep unit hood (taped together). New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025
The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2025
The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety licensed with RIDOH. Application provided. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2025

There was no evidence that employees are required to report to the person in charge information about their health (illnesses, symptoms) as they relate to diseases that are transmissible through food. RIDOH guidance provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2025
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. RIDOH guidance provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2025

The dishwasher failed to wash his/her hands between loading soiled and unloading clean dishes from the dishwasher. Food employees must clean their hands after handling soiled equipment or utensils. PIC addressed with staff. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2025
Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2025

A bucket was observed in the hand sink at the coffee station; a strainer and drip line were observed in the hand wash sink at the bar. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2025

Raw animal foods (fish) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (dry spices and garnishes) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2025

Food contact surfaces of the following equipment/utensils were observed with an accumulation of food, debris, and biofilm: -bar ice machine -potato chopper -slicer. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Items were taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized; ice disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2025

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (in contact with bottles) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. PIC relocated. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2025
The following were observed not in good repair: -walk-n gaskets -walk-in latch (top) -small prep unit (leak) -slicer (per PIC). New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025

The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the kitchen. Inspector provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris:-large ice machine vents-several lids to food containers-vents to hoods in prep area-cold drawer and small prep unit gaskets-plastic hotel pans 9sticker residue). New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2025

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2025
Pooled grey water was observed pooled in the drain under the prep sink. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2025
Several ceiling tiles were observed missing in the prep area. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2025

Protective shielding is not provided for the lights in the prep area. Light bulbs must be shielded, coated, or otherwise shatter-resistant in areas where there is exposed food; clean equipment, utensils, and linens; or unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2025
A light under the cookline hood was observed non-functional at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2025
